examples: By focusing on what is whole and untainted in them, you reinforce it.
But it is hardly untainted by barbaric Western ideas about management.
Appointing Mr Loscher, an untainted outsider, was an effort to draw a line under the scandal.
But it goes on to add that the Argentine is "not untainted by controversy".
The idea of an untainted Yankee taking back that crown was intoxicating at the time.
